description: Practical BB defend ranges for 9-max cash. Two extra positions: UTG (tightest) and UTG+1/MP.

scenarios.label: BB vs UTG
scenarios.summary: Tightest defense spot at a 9-handed table. UTG is even more condensed than 6-max UTG. Defend a narrow suited range and pure broadways. 3-bet only premiums + A5s/A4s blockers.
notes: Fold most offsuit below JTo
Small pairs okay as set-miners but tight
3-bet only AA/KK/QQ/JJ + suited wheel aces
KQo is a fold vs tight 9-max UTG regs

scenarios.label: BB vs UTG+1
scenarios.summary: UTG+1 opens slightly wider than UTG. Add a couple suited connectors and AQo to calling range.
notes: Slightly wider than vs UTG
Add suited connectors down to 65s
3-bet range stays similar — maybe add AJs
KQo becomes a clear call

scenarios.label: BB vs MP
scenarios.summary: MP (LJ) opens ~15-17% of hands. Defend suited connectors more liberally, add QJo/JTo to calling range.
notes: MP opens broader — more trashy suited hands in their range
Defend suited connectors to 54s
3-bet lighter — add KJs as bluff
QJo and JTo are clear calls

scenarios.label: BB vs HJ
scenarios.summary: Slightly wider than vs MP. HJ opens around 20% of hands. Add lower suited connectors and some mixed suited aces.
notes: Fold offsuit junk below JTo
Suited wheel aces become calls or mix
3-bet bluffs add A3s/A2s

scenarios.label: BB vs CO
scenarios.summary: CO opens ~25% of hands. Defend aggressively. Lower suited connectors and weaker offsuit hands become defends.
notes: CO range includes plenty of weak suited hands
3-bet bluffs extend to suited one-gappers
Protect your BB — don't overfold

scenarios.label: BB vs BTN
scenarios.summary: BTN opens ~45% of hands. Defend very wide — this is the most profitable BB defense spot.
notes: BTN has tons of weak hands — punish them
3-bet polarized: premiums + suited wheel aces + connectors
Even weak offsuit hands have decent equity HU

scenarios.label: BB vs SB
scenarios.summary: Heads-up vs the SB who must act OOP post-flop. Defend the widest range here — the SB has range disadvantage.
notes: SB opens very wide and has no positional advantage
3-bet any two reasonable cards in polarized spots
Even K-hi hands have value HU OOP for villain
